---
title: "Term Project Repoert "
subtitle: "IBM 6540 Term Project Proposal"
author: "Group [#]: Michelle Diaz, [Name], [Name], [Name]"
date: "2026-07-14"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    incremental: false
    toc: false
    logo: images/cpp_logo.png
    footer: "IBM 6540 - Marketing Data Science"
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---
